programme.title: 🌊 0.8m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
Those 0.8m lumps might offer a ride or two, but mostly a close encounter with seaweed and disappointment.

Lagide's offering a 1.4m onshore slop today; better to watch the windsurfers eat it.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 32.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 55.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 2.4m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Significant wind chop

programme.title: 💨 1.2m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze and 1.2m swell, today's session will primarily involve fighting whitewater for fleeting glimpses of sand.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 29.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 54.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 2.3m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Significant wind chop

programme.title: 💨 1.2m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
